## What changed

## Why

## How you verified it

"Tests pass" and "tested on real hardware" are different claims — say which
one you're making, and for what part of the change. If you couldn't test
something (no wall access), say that plainly rather than leaving it implied.

## Does this need a wall to review?

If reviewing this properly requires access to a physical wall (swap timing,
color/brightness on real LEDs, OSC round-trip with a real controller), say so
here so the reviewer knows what they can and can't confirm from the diff alone.
